text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With summer camp coming up, Super Creek
gushes about wanting to spoil me rotten.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She also wants to find a way to overcome her bad
health.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After surmising what the cause of her condition
might be, I make it my goal to have her change
her mindset.
